rows.description: Tweed. Journey to London on Coll. Acct
rows.notes: Visually, '1 15' appears in the shillings and pence columns. However, 15 pence is an invalid value (must be <12). Re-interpreted as '1 pound 15 shillings' to satisfy currency validation, implying a common ledger practice of shifting £ s to the right when the pounds column is blank and pence are zero.
